ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Valued Customer,

We hope you’re enjoying your experience with Acme CRM. This is a reminder that your subscription for the Pro Plan will renew on 30th September 2024. Your current plan includes:

- Unlimited contacts
- Advanced reporting
- 24/7 support

To review your renewal details or make changes, please visit:

<URL>

Thank you for choosing Acme CRM. We look forward to serving you in the coming year.

Best regards,
Acme CRM Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #12345 – Immediate Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

QuickBooks Online alerts you that invoice #12345 has not been paid. The total remains outstanding at $1,234.56. QuickBooks automatically applies a late fee of $99.99 if payment is not received within 7 days.

Please click the secure payment link below to resolve this issue immediately:

<URL>

Failure to pay by 15th September 2024 will result in automatic suspension of your QuickBooks Online services.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Department
